name: Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop
corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices and TruckMap agree on 3686 Pulaski Hwy, Cornersville 37047, I-65 Exit 22, 100 spaces/5 lanes/4 showers, CAT Scale and 24-hour operation. WSMV News and PR Newswire confirm the rebuild and June 2026 reopening as Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop (formerly The Tennessean Truck Stop, est. 1974). Official brand sites dollystravelstops.com and tennesseantravelstop.com were egress-blocked to the fetcher; identity confirmed via news + directories.

name: CAT Scale at Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop
corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices lists 'CAT Scales' and 'Scales - Certified' in the Tennessean amenity set at Exit 22; an iExit amenity listing corroborates CAT Scales at the Tennessean. The official catscale.com locator was egress-blocked, so the national CAT Scale site is used for contact; no separate facility phone confirmed.

name: Pilot Travel Center #406
corroboration: Official Pilot Flying J locator (locations.pilotflyingj.com) returns 403 to the agent proxy (egress-policy blocked). Identity, address, exit, phone, and CAT Scale corroborated across 4 independent directories (truckstopsandservices, findfuelstops, parkadvisor, findtruckservice). Store slightly below the exit 27-53 window but included because Cornersville is a named target city.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #406
corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices lists CAT scales at Pilot #406, and 4RoadService lists a CAT Scale provider in Cornersville at the Pilot location. Official catscale.com locator egress-blocked; national CAT Scale site used for contact, no separate facility phone confirmed.
dupes: CAT Scale — Pilot Travel Center #406, Cornersville

name: Shady Lawn Truck Stop
corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices, AllStays and ParkAdvisor agree on 1371 Bryson Rd, Elkton 38449, phone 931-468-0601, I-65 Exit 6, 42 spaces/4 lanes/4 showers, certified scales and 4 service bays. Tripadvisor and Humanities Tennessee corroborate the location and the 'Big Chicken' restaurant. Facility has certified (non-CAT) scales, so no CAT Scale row is created.

name: Shady Lawn Truck Stop Tire & Repair
corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices and AllStays both list tire repair (Bandag/Bridgestone/Firestone/Goodyear/Michelin) and 4 truck service bays at Shady Lawn Truck Stop, Exit 6, Elkton; co-located distinct tire/repair service.

name: Motel 6 Pulaski, TN
corroboration: Motel 6 official site, iExit and HotelPlanner agree on 2400 US-64 East, Pulaski 38478, I-65 Exit 14; iExit confirms free car and truck parking on site. Truck-space count not published, left blank.

name: Tennessee Welcome Center - I-65 (Ardmore, Northbound)
publish_reason: Direction (northbound, MM ~3) and truck access are confirmed, but posted rules prohibit overnight parking (2-hour limit), so it does not fit an overnight truck-parking listing. Held per conservative rest-area/welcome-center rule.
corroboration: TennesseeRestAreas and RestAreas.org agree on a northbound-only welcome center at I-65 MM ~3.1, Ardmore 38449, open 24h with separate truck/passenger parking, 2-hour limit and no overnight parking; TNVacation (official) confirms the Ardmore/Giles County welcome center. Overnight prohibition confirmed, so held.

name: TDOT I-65 Truck Parking Area (former Northbound Weigh Station, Giles County)
publish_reason: TDOT project reporting confirms a NB weigh station was converted to truck parking, but exact location (MM/exit), space count and legal overnight-parking status could not be independently confirmed from an official TDOT source (tn.gov pages were egress-blocked).
corroboration: America's Transportation Awards writeup of TDOT's I-65 widening states Phase 1 converted a northbound weigh station into a truck parking area (completed Sept 2024); TruckMap references the NB scale house location near Ardmore. Location/capacity/overnight details unconfirmed, held.

name: I-65 Giles County Weigh Station (Northbound, Ardmore)
publish_reason: Conflicting information on current operating status: TDOT widening reporting says a NB weigh station here was converted to truck parking (completed Sept 2024), yet directory/THP references still list a Giles County scale house. Official THP CVE page (tn.gov) was egress-blocked, so permanent/operational status and exact direction/MM could not be independently confirmed.
corroboration: TruckMap and TruckerGuide reference a NB scale house near Ardmore (MM ~5.5, phone 931-424-0420), but TDOT widening reporting indicates a NB weigh station in this stretch was converted to truck parking. Because current operating status conflicts and the official THP CVE page could not be fetched, held pending confirmation.

name: Love's Travel Stop #346
corroboration: Official loves.com page returns 403 to the agent proxy. Address, phone, exit 46, showers, diesel lanes, CAT Scale, and Love's Truck Care corroborated by truckstopsandservices, TruckMap, Find Truck Service, and RVParky. truck_spaces left blank due to source conflict (80 vs 100).

name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #346, Columbia
corroboration: Official CAT Scale locator is egress-policy blocked (403). CAT Scale at Love's #346 corroborated by truckstopsandservices ('CAT Scales / Scales - Certified'), a dedicated 'CAT Scale - Columbia, TN' business page, and Allstays TN CAT Scale list. Scale phone matches Love's #346 (931-388-1217).

name: Love's Truck Care — Love's Travel Stop #346
corroboration: Love's Truck Care on-site presence corroborated by a dedicated Love's Truck Care (Columbia) business listing, truckstopsandservices, and Find Truck Service. Categorized as 'Tire Repair' consistent with existing production Love's Truck Care entries. Follows the co-location model (separate row from the host Love's #346 truck stop).

name: Quality Inn Columbia I-65
publish_reason: Truck/large-vehicle parking is stated only by third-party OTA listings (HotelPlanner, Expedia, HotelGuides); not confirmed on the official Choice Hotels page and no space count available. Category-fit (truck parking) unverified.
corroboration: Identity/address/exit 46 confirmed across Choice Hotels, HotelPlanner, Yelp and Expedia. Truck parking claim appears only in aggregator amenity blurbs; held pending official confirmation.

name: TA Franklin (TravelCenters of America #157)
corroboration: TA official location page (TA Franklin) + truckstopsandservices (Travel Centers of America #157, I-65 Exit 61) + iExit (TA Travel Center, Exit 61) + Find Truck Service (#157) + TruckMap all agree on brand, 4400 Peytonsville Road Franklin 37064, exit 61, phone 615-794-8406, 74 spaces, 6 showers, 7 fuel lanes, CAT Scale and TA Truck Service on site.

name: CAT Scale - TA Franklin #157
corroboration: TA Franklin #157 amenity list (truckstopsandservices, I-65 Exit 61) and Find Truck Service both explicitly list a CAT Scale on site; corroborated by the allstays Tennessee CAT Scale directory. CAT Scale official locator (catscale.com) was blocked at the egress gateway.

name: TA Truck Service - TA Franklin #157
corroboration: Find Truck Service (TA Truck Service #157, Franklin) + TA Truck Service Franklin TN Facebook page + 4RoadService (TA Franklin) all confirm an on-site TA Truck Service repair shop with 2 bays offering tires and heavy-truck repair at 4400 Peytonsville Rd, I-65 Exit 61.

name: Love's Travel Stop #429
corroboration: Official Love's location page + truckstopsandservices + Yelp + TruckMap all confirm 130 W Trinity Ln, Nashville 37207, phone 615-226-6393, Love's #429. AARoads confirms the Trinity Lane interchange is on the I-65/I-24 concurrency and RETAINS I-65 exit numbering (exit 87); iExit lists it as I-65 Exit 87 (US-431/Trinity Ln), ~0.25 mi from exit 87B. Yelp shows the same address was previously Pilot #292 (rebrand, not a second facility).

name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #429, Nashville
corroboration: CAT Scale locator returns a CAT Scale at the I-24/I-65 Exit 87 / 130 W Trinity Ln, Nashville location (phone 615-226-6393). Love's official page and truckstopsandservices amenity list both confirm CAT Scale on site.

name: Love's Truck Care - Love's Travel Stop #429
corroboration: Firestone Commercial and Bridgestone Commercial dealer locators both list a Love's Travel Stop commercial truck tire dealer at exactly 130 W Trinity Ln, Nashville. Love's page and truckstopsandservices confirm 4 truck service bays, tire repair, and road service at the site.

name: Love's Travel Stop #629
corroboration: Address 1001 Highway 76, White House 37188, Exit 108 (TN-76), and phone 615-672-0261 consistent across Love's official location URL, Yelp, Find Truck Service, Yellow Pages, and Interstate Logos. 83 parking spaces / 7 showers / CAT Scale reported by Find Truck Service and Speedco/Love's Truck Care listings. Official loves.com and catscale.com are policy-blocked to WebFetch in this environment; verified via search snippets from >=2 independent directories.

name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #629, White House
corroboration: CAT Scale at I-65/TN-76 Exit 108, White House, phone 615-672-0261 listed by Allstays CAT Scale directory and corroborated by the Love's #629 amenity listing (CAT Scale) and Speedco service-center description. catscale.com locator is policy-blocked to WebFetch; identity confirmed via >=2 independent sources.

name: Love's Truck Care / Speedco — Love's #629, White House
corroboration: Love's Truck Care at 1001 Hwy 76, White House (I-65 Exit 108) confirmed by Yelp, Find Truck Service (#629), and TruckDown Speedco listing; tire brands and services consistent across sources. Official loves.com/speedco policy-blocked to WebFetch; verified via >=2 independent directories.

name: MAPCO Express #1028
corroboration: MAPCO Express #1028 at 8631 Hwy 25 E, Cross Plains 37049, I-65 Exit 112, phone 615-654-2599, ~30 truck spaces, 6 fuel lanes, showers, Subway confirmed across TruckMap, Fueloyal, FindFuelStops, iExit, and Allstays. Actively listed in current directories.

name: Park City Truck Park (Truck Parking Club)
corroboration: 7409 Cycle Lane, Goodlettsville 37072, phone 615-484-5781, ~30 available (101 capacity) gravel lot with 24/7 access confirmed by Truck Parking Club, Carrier Network, TruxSpot, TruckerPath, and the operator's Facebook page. Exit number left blank: one source cited Exit 104 but it was not independently corroborated, so it is not asserted.

name: Twice Daily / Daily's #6603 (Goodlettsville)
publish_reason: Truck parking minimal/unconfirmed (sources conflict: 'no parking' vs ~2 public spaces); functions primarily as a fuel/convenience stop rather than an overnight truck stop. Category-fit and truck parking not independently confirmed.
corroboration: Location 150 Long Hollow Pike, Goodlettsville 37072, I-65 Exit 97, 24-hour diesel/DEF confirmed by TruckMap, Yelp, and iExit. Truck parking capacity conflicting across directories (no parking vs ~2 spaces); held pending confirmation of overnight truck access.

name: Tennessee Weigh Station — I-65 Southbound (Robertson County, near KY line)
publish_reason: Direction (southbound) and general location confirmed via TDOT project page, but exact mile marker and current operational status are uncertain due to active reconstruction (est. completion Q3 2026). TDOT/THP pages are policy-blocked to WebFetch; not independently field-verified.
corroboration: TDOT I-65 (Nashville-to-KY-line) project page describes a southbound weigh station being upgraded with new scales, truck inspection station, and ~36 parking spaces; iExit lists an I-65 TN weigh station. Held per conservative rule pending exact-location and operating-status confirmation.

name: I-65 Northbound Truck Parking Area (former weigh station, Robertson County)
publish_reason: State-operated (unnamed) parking area; capacity, exact mile marker, and legal overnight-parking status unconfirmed. TDOT page policy-blocked to WebFetch; not independently field-verified.
corroboration: TDOT project description (via search snippet) states the northbound weigh station was converted into a truck parking area (phase completed 9/19/2024). Single authoritative source only and policy-blocked to WebFetch; held pending direct confirmation.
